label: Verification Advantage
description: Strict verification creates new margin for verification and settlement layer businesses

causal_translation.trigger_text: Verification enforcement is strict in this assumption profile.
causal_translation.rule_text: Strict verification creates a new revenue-generating layer for businesses positioned in verification or settlement.
causal_translation.shift_text: Verification becomes a structural advantage rather than a cost.
causal_translation.effect_text: Verification layer: +20% margin. Settlement layer: +10% margin. Model structurally advantaged.
